title: taraxacum dovrense
intro: Taraxacum dovrense, also known as the Dovre dandelion, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Norway. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum dovrense include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
